snippet.title: Lil Baby - Dead Fresh (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Stream Lil Baby's "Dead Fresh" here:
https://lilbaby.lnk.to/DeadFresh

Lyrics:
Okay I’m dead fresh Carlton (dead fresh)
Bottega cardigan (yeah)
Virgin Mary flower set
Yeah I pull up fresh as hell
Er’one of us got M’s (gimme ‘em)
Bitch talkin bout send Zelle
Hoe get out my ear
Money comin’ in, I put my nanny in Chanel
Made it out the slum, I got my granny pushin’ a Maybach
If I lose it all, is you gon’ hold it down for real
Hold up, h-h-h-h-h-hol
This beat came from Pharrell (yeah)

First of all, I am not a trick lil bitty bitch, but I will boss you up
I like when she post a picture in some shit I bought for her
Pack out, rock out shows around the globe I got my offers up
Fashion shows want me front row, I bringin’ my coffee cup
Trynna make all my greats outweigh my goods, I hope my heart don’t bust
You look way better with my skin, your boyfriend’s an eyesore

Really came from nothin’
Livin’ in a hotel with my sisters and my mama (stackin’)
First black man to do it where I’m from, I’m like Obama (no cap)
Motorcade through traffic when I’m in the town
Dope boy swag forever, I’m weant’ Evisus off the Pelle
I got diamonds songs, rock Air Force Ones, earrings like Nelly (yeah)
She had tried to play, I hit her biggest opp off I’m petty
Country boy I got 400 bands inside the Chevy

442 get up the motor this is old school (skrrt)
Inside lookin’ like some creme brulee, the leather soft as butter
Raised my right hand up to God and tell a lie unto say your honor
I got rich, but everyday I wake up lookin’ for a come up
Louis Vuitton don
Jacket cost a dub (yeah)
Don Julio (yeah), turnin’ up the club (yeah)
I done cut her off she tryna pop out with a scrub
I’m putin’ on that stuff (yeah)
Chrome Hearts on her Uggs (yeah)
I invest my money in the skreets and watch it double
Million for the lawyer fees Ion’t care bout gettin’ in trouble

I been that

I be makin’ my watches match my car, I’m really flexin’, and I’m steppin’, and

Yeah I pull up fresh as hell

snippet.title: Mi Corazón se Rinde Ante Ti
snippet.description:
A veces pensamos que rendirnos significa perder, pero con Dios ocurre todo lo contrario. La mayor victoria de nuestra vida comienza cuando rendimos nuestro corazón a Cristo. ❤️

“Mi Corazón se Rinde Ante Ti” es una canción de adoración que expresa gratitud, confianza y la paz que solo Jesús puede dar. Cuando dejamos de depender de nuestras fuerzas y ponemos nuestra vida en Sus manos, descubrimos que Su amor siempre nos sostiene.

Si esta alabanza toca tu corazón, permite que sea una oración de entrega y un recordatorio de que en Cristo siempre encontramos la verdadera victoria.

🔔 Suscríbete a Mensaje de Dios Diario para recibir música cristiana original, reflexiones bíblicas y contenido que fortalezca tu fe.

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community.  Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn
